source_logic: Contracted/booking ARR from signed Closed Won opportunities
known_caveats: Includes signed-but-not-yet-billed and does not drop churned accounts; overstates.

source_logic: Billing ARR = active subscription MRR x 12
known_caveats: System of record; excludes churned subscriptions (coverage gaps possible).

source_logic: Usage-based revenue estimate implied by product consumption
Seats sold/contracted on the CRM order
Seats provisioned on the active billing subscription
Distinct seats active in the last 30 days
known_caveats: System of record; true active usage.

source_logic: Count of accounts with a Closed Won opportunity (1 per account)
Count of accounts with an active subscription (1 per account)
known_caveats: System of record; excludes churned subscriptions.

source_logic: Count of accounts with recent product usage (1 per account)
known_caveats: Counts accounts using the product even if churned in billing.
